name: com.box3lab.box3
description:
Box3 方块编辑工具包 / Box3 Blocks Toolkit
▪ 可视化搭建与编辑
▪ 地形导入/导出
▪ 图集与材质自动生成
▪ 支持编辑器与运行时 API 二次开发
▪ Visual block world building and editing
▪ Import/export terrain data
▪ Automatic atlas and material generation
▪ Reusable APIs for both Editor and Runtime

samples.description: Editor sample for noise-based terrain generation with Box3Api.
Runtime sample for block placement and erase testing with Box3Api.
